title: remove_member_and_maybe_delete_group redundant DELETE on final leave
description: store.rs: first DELETE removes the leaving member by (group_id, pub_id). COUNT returns 0 (no other members). The branch then runs a second DELETE FROM group_members WHERE group_id = ?1 before deleting the group row. This second DELETE is always a no-op when remaining == 0. Wasted DB round-trip per final group leave.
